rationale: Gov't Code §2256.025 governs selection of authorized investment brokers by entities. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The governing body of an entity subject to this subchapter or the designated investment committee of the entity shall, at least annually, review, revise, and adopt a list of qualified brokers that are authorized to engage in investment transactions with the entity.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns investment broker selection, not property tax exemptions.
